'''najate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaquaversally|quaquaversally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaquaversally|quaquaversally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| najate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:najate|najate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:najatesher|najatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najatesherĂ«m|najatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:najatero|najatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:najateshĂ«|najateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najateshĂ«m|najateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinajatero|gokinajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinajateshĂ«|gokinajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinajateshĂ«m|gokinajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonajankerom|gonajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonajankeshĂ«|gonajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonajankeshĂ«m|gonajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonajankeya|gonajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:najaterom|najaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najatemu|najatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:najateya|najateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinajaterom|gokinajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinajatemu|gokinajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinajateya|gokinajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:najajate|najajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:najajatesher|najajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najajatesherĂ«m|najajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:najajatero|najajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:najajateshĂ«|najajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najajateshĂ«m|najajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinajajatero|gokinajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinajajateshĂ«|gokinajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinajajateshĂ«m|gokinajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonajajankerom|gonajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonajajankeshĂ«|gonajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonajajankeshĂ«m|gonajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonajajankeya|gonajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:najajaterom|najajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najajatemu|najajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:najajateya|najajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinajajaterom|gokinajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinajajatemu|gokinajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinajajateya|gokinajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠte|nĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠtesher|nĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠtero|nĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠjĂŠtero|gokinĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠterom|nĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠtemu|nĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠteya|nĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠjĂŠterom|gokinĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠjĂŠteya|gokinĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafjafte|nafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafjaftesher|nafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafjaftesherĂ«m|nafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafjaftero|nafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafjafteshĂ«|nafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafjafteshĂ«m|nafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafjaftero|gokinafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafjafteshĂ«|gokinafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafjafteshĂ«m|gokinafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafjafnkerom|gonafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafjafnkeshĂ«|gonafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafjafnkeshĂ«m|gonafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafjafnkeya|gonafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafjafterom|nafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafjaftemu|nafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafjafteya|nafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafjafterom|gokinafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafjaftemu|gokinafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafjafteya|gokinafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
